overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a scenic riverbank. The character travels from a grassy meadow down to a sandy shore, approaching a historic stone bridge with mountains in the background. Bright midday lighting with clear skies.

events.description: character descends gentle slope from grassy meadow toward the sandy shoreline
ground surface transitions from grass to sandy riverbank

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through tall grass and purple wildflowers overlooking the river, then descending toward the water's edge

entered.detail: distant snow-capped mountains forming the horizon backdrop
calm reflective water stretching across the middle of the scene
historic stone arch bridge spanning the river in the distance
lush green grass covering the ground where the character walks
tall purple flowers scattered throughout the grass
clusters of green trees lining the opposite riverbank
distant stone tower visible on a hill behind the trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt standing in a grassy meadow overlooking a scenic river. The character walks forward through tall grass and purple wildflowers, descending a gentle slope toward the water. Distant mountains frame the background while a historic stone bridge spans the river ahead.

events.description: character adjusts path to follow the curve of the sandy shoreline

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the sandy riverbank with calm water lapping at the shore to his right

entered.detail: light-colored sandy and muddy ground along the water's edge
small rustic wooden structure visible among the trees on the far bank

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sandy riverbank, the terrain shifts from grass to light-colored sand and mud. The stone bridge ahead grows slightly larger in view while a small wooden hut appears on the distant right shore. The character maintains a steady pace following the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching stone arch bridge along riverbank

events.description: stone bridge becomes prominent landmark as character approaches within close distance

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the sandy bank, approaching the historic stone bridge structure visible ahead

entered.detail: cylindrical stone tower structure adjacent to the bridge on the left bank

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt approaching the historic stone bridge, which now dominates the center of the view. A stone tower structure becomes visible on the left bank near the bridge. The sandy shore continues underfoot as the character walks steadily toward the bridge structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt descends from a lush, wildflower-filled meadow toward a historic stone bridge along a riverbank. It begins with the character walking through tall grass and purple blooms, moving down a gentle slope with distant mountains framing the horizon. As the terrain shifts, the greenery gives way to a light-colored sandy and muddy shore, while a small wooden hut emerges on the distant right bank. The scene then expands as the character follows the water's edge, bringing the stone bridge into dominant view in the center of the frame. Finally, the camera approaches the bridge structure as a stone tower becomes visible on the left bank, maintaining a steady pace across the sand.
